title: Comlaude
description:
Comlaude is a domain management platform that provides comprehensive domain portfolio intelligence. This connector integrates with the Comlaude API Domain Search Endpoint to retrieve all domains within a specified group along with detailed information for each domain.

Use cases:

- Allowlisting: Import known-good domains to prevent false positives in threat detection
- Brand Protection: Track your organization's domains for security monitoring
- Asset Inventory: Maintain an up-to-date inventory of domains within your organization
short_description: Comlaude connector imports domain portfolio information from the Comlaude API into OpenCTI, supporting CTI allowlist management and domain intelligence.
